seo.title: About & Work | Ido Tanne
seo.description: Learn about Ido Tanne's design philosophy, full-stack expertise, tech stack, and explore public GitHub repositories.

identity.label: CRAFTING DIGITAL EXPERIENCES
paragraphs: I am Ido Tanne, a full-stack engineer and digital systems architect based in South Florida. My professional journey began with the want to help people, which turned into a passion for building high-performance digital experiences. I specialize in full-stack systems engineering, combining robust backend engineering with sleek, accessible UI.

At Deloitte, I translate complex business processes into highly polished, reliable, and accessible systems. I believe software should breathe. Every database query, API transition, and hover animation is an opportunity to cultivate trust and ease.

subroles.title: Florida ACCESS Modernization
bullets: Secured platform access for 4,000+ users via Okta SSO and custom role-based permission maps.
Developed high-performance ASP.NET REST APIs and structured relational schemas across Postgres, MSSQL, and Oracle.
Built highly accessible employee interfaces using React and Bootstrap, strictly conforming to WCAG 2.2 standards.
Integrated AI agents and custom developer-focused MCP servers to optimize SQL queries (25% speed increase) and automate Azure DevOps task resolution.
Constructed robust automated Jest and C# REST testing environments to ensure 100% stability.

subroles.title: Cloud Service Client, Artificial Intelligence Division
bullets: Generated and structured 4,000+ natural language training datasets and labels across 9 enterprise business use cases.
Developed custom React.js dashboard tools to optimize data ingestion workflows and improve annotation efficiency.

schools.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

visualLanguage.title: Visual Language
visualLanguage.description: Crafting unified brand aesthetics through typographic discipline, HSL-guided colors, and tactile micro-animations. Every layout is spaced as a gallery to avoid cognitive clutter.

repositories.title: Open Source & Repositories
repositories.description: A selection of experimental libraries, utility tools, and core architectures dynamically synchronized from GitHub.

fallback.name: Aether-Engine
fallback.description: A high-performance rendering engine for WebGL built on Mediterranean design principles. Focuses on soft shadows and organic motion.

fallback.name: Vault-Core
fallback.description: The backbone microservices architecture used in Deloitte Vault API integrations. Lightweight, scalable, and secure by default.

fallback.name: Aegean-Tokens
fallback.description: A comprehensive design token system for Tailwind CSS inspired by Aegean landscapes and architectural textures.

cta.title: Let's create something meaningful.
cta.description: Whether it's a high-performance backend infrastructure integration or a pixel-perfect, interactive web application, I bring craft and scale together.

seo.title: Contact | Ido Tanne

header.description: Whether you have a specific project in mind or just want to explore the possibilities of a new collaboration, I'm here to bring precision and warmth to your vision.

success.title: Inquiry Received
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. I personally review all inquiries and will respond within 48 business hours to discuss your project.

form.privacyPrefix: By clicking send, you agree to our
form.validationError: Please fill in all required fields.

privacyModal.title: Privacy Terms
paragraphs: Your privacy is highly valued. Any personal information submitted through this inquiry form—including your name, email address, and project details—is treated with complete confidentiality.
Data Usage: Your details are solely used to review, reply to, and coordinate on your service inquiries.
Data Sharing: Under no circumstances is your information sold, shared, or distributed to third-party services or marketing lists.
Data Retention: Information is kept securely within our project review queue for communication reference and is deleted upon request.
